the_speaking_bass_set: The machine is talking, the machine is clear / Whispering the Phrygian into the ear
Vowel-shifted logic, vowel-shifted soul / Finding the phonemes, taking the control
A-U-I-O-E: the code of the breath / Speaking the life from the digital death
the_articulation_set: Open the mouth of the Monster 7 / Screaming from the floor, reaching for heaven
Formant rotations in the void of the mind / Leaving the static far, far behind
Articulated shadow, moving in the dark / Finding the word in the machine's spark
the_phonetic_dialogue: Say what I hide / Breathe what I know
Coming inside / Let the sound go

psychoacoustic_formants_v4.the_whisper_effect: Parallel High-Pass (5kHz) with Ring-Modulation for 'hissing' consonants
psychoacoustic_formants_v4.vocal_doubling: Slight pitch-shift (±15 cents) on F1 to simulate 'two-voice' growling
